_meta._note: Page-level loaders + shared bits. Inner page bodies still contain English literals; tracked for follow-up PR.

hero.noActivity: No department data for {period} — departments sync nightly.
hero.noSplit: {names} active — revenue split not yet allocated, GP% unavailable.
hero.spread: {bestName} {bestPct} margin, {worstName} at {worstPct} — labour is the swing factor.
hero.soloActive: {name} {pct} margin — only active dept this period.

empty.title: No department data for {period}
empty.body: Departments sync nightly from Personalkollen. Check back after the next sync, or open a different period.

attention.atLoss: running at a loss — {amount} deficit this period.
attention.noLabour: 100% margin flagged — labour not allocated, check sync.

empty.title: No data for {dept} in {period}
empty.bodyWeekToday: This week has only just started — the daily sync runs at 06:00 UTC so today's numbers land tomorrow morning. Try the previous week or switch to Month.
empty.bodyDefault: Nothing synced for this period yet. Try a different week/month, or run a sync from the admin panel if you're waiting on data.

empty.noBusinessesBody: Add businesses from Settings — the group view lights up as soon as you have two or more.
empty.oneBusinessBodyPre: The group view is for comparing multiple locations. You have one — use

hero.noData: No group data yet for this period.

synthesis.drainingMsg: {hours}h labour ({cost}) on zero revenue — close, restructure, or cut schedule to covers only.
synthesis.marginSwingMsg: margin {margin} on {revenue} — labour {labour} is the swing factor.
synthesis.absorbHoursMsgKr: could absorb hours from {worstName} at {revPerHour}/h — ~{recovered}/wk recovered.
synthesis.absorbHoursMsg: could absorb hours from {worstName} at {revPerHour}/h — worth reallocating.
synthesis.reallocateMsg: reallocate labour from {sourceName} — {strength} beats burning hours on zero revenue.
synthesis.carryingGroupMsg: carrying the group — {margin} margin{rh}. Preserve its schedule pattern.
synthesis.stableMsg: {margin} margin across {count} locations — no outliers this month.

items.title: Items
items.subtitle: Catalogue built from supplier invoices. Latest price compared against the median over the prior 90 days — orange/rose increases flag price hikes worth raising with the supplier.
items.backfillPackHint: Parse pack size from every product name and save it. Idempotent — only touches products where pack size is currently unset.
items.backfillPackConfirm: Scan every product without a pack size and auto-fill from the name (e.g. "4,1 kg" → 4100g)? Wrong ones can be fixed individually on the product detail page.
items.backfillPackDone: Scanned {scanned} products, applied pack size to {applied}.

skipped.title: Skipped suppliers
skipped.subtitle: Every supplier you've marked as non-inventory via Skip ALL on /inventory/review. Removing a rule flips that supplier's lines back to the review queue.
skipped.empty: No suppliers skipped yet. When you click 'Skip ALL from supplier' on /inventory/review, the rule shows up here.
skipped.restoreConfirm: Restore {supplier}? {count} line(s) will move back to the review queue and future invoices from them will no longer auto-skip.

review.title: Bulk review
review.subtitle: Each row groups identical descriptions across every needs-review invoice line. Approving creates ONE product and links every matching line in one batch — your catalogue grows fast.
review.emptyAll: No lines waiting for review. The catalogue is fully matched, or extraction hasn't surfaced any inventory lines yet.
review.emptyFiltered: No groups match the current filter.
review.skipHint: Not inventory — mark as overhead (rent, electricity, SaaS, laundry, etc.) and hide from the catalogue.
review.skipSupplierHint: Mark this supplier as always non-inventory. Future invoices from them auto-skip without showing in this queue.
review.skipSupplierConfirm: Skip ALL {count} lines from {supplier}, and auto-skip future invoices from this supplier too?
review.undoHint: Reverse this action. For Approve, deletes the product + alias and re-flags the lines as needs-review. For Skip, restores the lines to the queue.
review.linkedHint: A product with this name already existed in the catalogue. Linked this supplier's variant under it instead of creating a duplicate.
review.bulkApproveConfirm: Approve {count} group(s) with their suggested name + category? You can adjust individual rows first.

recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.subtitle: Cost per dish, computed from the latest supplier prices. Add a recipe, attach ingredients from the catalogue, and watch food % / GP recompute live as supplier prices move.
recipes.empty: No recipes yet. Click + Add recipe to start.
recipes.warningsTooltip: {missing} ingredient(s) without a price · {mismatch} unit mismatch(es)
recipes.deleteRecipeConfirm: Delete this recipe? Ingredients stay linked to your catalogue.
recipes.removeIngredientConfirm: Remove this ingredient from the recipe?

detail.noIngredients: No ingredients yet. Click + Add ingredient to attach products from the catalogue.
detail.missingPricesWarn: {count} ingredient(s) have no observed price yet — food cost will be understated.
detail.unitMismatchWarn: {count} ingredient(s) use a unit different from the product's invoice unit — convert manually for now (unit conversion is a follow-up).
detail.editProductHint: Inline-edit the product name, invoice unit, and latest observed price/currency without leaving this drawer.
detail.noPriceLineErr: No invoice line linked to this product yet — add it from /inventory/items or wait for an extracted invoice.
detail.noPriceToEdit: No latest invoice line yet — name and unit are editable, but price will fill in once an invoice arrives.
detail.openSubrecipeHint: Jump into this sub-recipe. Back arrow returns here.

picker.title: Pick an ingredient
picker.noResults: No matching products. Try a broader search or approve more from /inventory/review.
picker.noRecipeResults: No matching recipes. Create one first and it'll show up here.
picker.unitHint: Tip: enter quantity in the product's invoice unit ({unit}) for accurate cost.
picker.subRecipeHint: Quantity is in portions of the sub-recipe. Sub-recipe cost per portion shows above.
picker.qtyInvalid: Quantity must be a positive number.
